parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        -- ═══ INFOS RAPPORT RH ═══
        XRAPRH.XNUM_0        AS num_rapport,
        XRAPRH.XDAT_0        AS date_rapport,
        TYPE.LANMES_0        AS type_rapport,
        XRAPRH.CREDATTIM_0   AS date_creation,
        XRAPRH.YDATCON_0     AS date_controle,
        XRAPRH.CREUSR_0      AS user_createur,
        XRAPRH.XRESP_0       AS cadre_juridique,
        XRAPRH.XCONC_0       AS concernes,
        XRAPRH.XOBJET_0      AS nom_prenom_sujet,
        XRAPRH.XSAL_0        AS code_salarie,
        XRAPRH.XFONC_0       AS fonction_salarie,
        XRAPRH.XADDR_0       AS adresse_salarie,
        XRAPRH.XMAT_0        AS matricule_salarie,

        -- ═══ INFOS SALARIÉ CONCERNÉ ═══
        SAL.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_salarie,
        SAL.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_salarie,
        SAL.XEMAIL_0         AS email_salarie,
        SAL.YTELE_0          AS tel_salarie,
        SAL.YSUP_0           AS code_superieur_salarie,

        -- ═══ INFOS CRÉATEUR (résolution dual-path) ═══
        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%' THEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 ELSE NULL END,
            YSALAUS.XSAL_0
        )                    AS code_createur,

        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XNAMSAL_0, CRE_LOGIN.XNAMSAL_0)  AS nom_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XPRENOM_0, CRE_LOGIN.XPRENOM_0)  AS prenom_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XEMAIL_0,  CRE_LOGIN.XEMAIL_0)   AS email_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.YTELE_0,   CRE_LOGIN.YTELE_0)    AS tel_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.YSUP_0,    CRE_LOGIN.YSUP_0)     AS code_sup_createur,

        -- ═══ INFOS SUPÉRIEUR DU CRÉATEUR ═══
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0,    SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0)     AS code_superieur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XNAMSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XNAMSAL_0)  AS nom_superieur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XPRENOM_0, SUP_LOGIN.XPRENOM_0)  AS prenom_superieur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XEMAIL_0,  SUP_LOGIN.XEMAIL_0)   AS email_superieur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.YTELE_0,   SUP_LOGIN.YTELE_0)    AS tel_superieur,

        -- ═══ RESPONSABLES FIXES ═══
        pdg.XSAL_0           AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0         AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0          AS tel_pdg,

        dga.XSAL_0           AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0         AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0          AS tel_dga,

        farhat.XSAL_0        AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0      AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0       AS tel_farhat,

        baallah.XSAL_0       AS code_baallah,
        baallah.XNAMSAL_0    AS nom_baallah,
        baallah.XPRENOM_0    AS prenom_baallah,
        baallah.XEMAIL_0     AS email_baallah,
        baallah.YTELE_0      AS tel_baallah,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM CRÉATEUR ═══
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(
                CASE WHEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%' THEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 ELSE NULL END,
                YSALAUS.XSAL_0
            )) AS chat_id_createur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(
                CASE WHEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%' THEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 ELSE NULL END,
                YSALAUS.XSAL_0
            )) AS langue_createur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(
                CASE WHEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%' THEN XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 ELSE NULL END,
                YSALAUS.XSAL_0
            )) AS bot_createur,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM SUPÉRIEUR ═══
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0)) AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0)) AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0)) AS bot_superieur,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM PDG (chat_id fixe) ═══
        '8528101210'          AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM DGA ═══
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS bot_dga,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM FARHAT ═══
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS bot_farhat,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM BAALLAH ═══
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah,

        -- ═══ DÉLAI & CALCULS ═══
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) AS delai_int,
        CASE
            WHEN XRAPRH.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01' THEN XRAPRH.YDATCON_0
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XRAPRH.CREDATTIM_0)
        END AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, XRAPRH.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,
        CASE
            WHEN XRAPRH.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), XRAPRH.YDATCON_0)
            ELSE
                DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XRAPRH.CREDATTIM_0))
        END AS jours_restants,
        CASE
            WHEN XRAPRH.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, XRAPRH.CREDATTIM_0, XRAPRH.YDATCON_0) / 2
            ELSE
                CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2
        END AS seuil_dga

    FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XRAPRH] XRAPRH

    LEFT JOIN [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[APLSTD] TYPE
        ON XRAPRH.XTYP_0 = TYPE.LANNUM_0
        AND TYPE.LANCHP_0 = 6074
        AND TYPE.LAN_0 = 'FRA'

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SAL
        ON SAL.XSAL_0 = XRAPRH.XSAL_0

    -- ─── Path 1 : CREUSR_0 est déjà un code X3 (commence par S) ───
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL CRE_DIRECT
        ON XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%'
        AND CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0 = XRAPRH.CREUSR_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP_DIRECT
        ON CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL
        AND SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0 = CRE_DIRECT.YSUP_0

    -- ─── Path 2 : CREUSR_0 est un login → résolution via YSALAUS ───
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS YSALAUS
        ON XRAPRH.CREUSR_0 NOT LIKE 'S%'
        AND YSALAUS.USER_0 = XRAPRH.CREUSR_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL CRE_LOGIN
        ON YSALAUS.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL
        AND CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP_LOGIN
        ON CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL
        AND SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0 = CRE_LOGIN.YSUP_0

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELRPRH'
    ) P

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066'
    ) pdg

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'
    ) dga

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602'
    ) farhat

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'
    ) baallah

    WHERE
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[AOBJTXT] AOBJTXT
            WHERE XRAPRH.XNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0 AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'XRAPRH'
        )
        AND CAST(XRAPRH.CREDATTIM_0 AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
)

SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 8  AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2
ORDER BY jours_restants ASC;

nodes.name: Vérifier Données Présentes
nodes.notes: Stoppe si aucun rapport RH à traiter

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire XRAPRH
nodes.notes: Groupe les rapports RH par destinataire avec comptage par type

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues XRAPRH
nodes.notes: Email + Telegram en FRA/ARA/ENG — affiche type rapport, cadre juridique, concernés

nodes.name: Envoi Email XRAPRH
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon niveau d'escalade

nodes.name: No Operation Pas de Chat ID
Fin Workflow XRAPRH
nodes.notes: Toutes les notifications rapports RH envoyées

main.node: No Operation Pas de Chat ID
